sections_cited: Section 17A of the Family Court Act

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. No. S-693 / 2025 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ DIRECTIONS For orders as to maintainability of Petition. 12.02.2026. Mr. Raja Jawad Ali Saahar, Advocate for Petitioner. Mr. Shahan Ali, Advocate for Respondent. ___________________ Through the instant Petition, the Petitioner has impugned order dated 24.05.2025. The noted order was passed under Section 17A of the Family Court Act, 1964 whereby, the Petitioner (Grand father of the minors) was directed to pay monthly maintenance for each minor at the rate of 15,000/- per month. Learned Counsel for the Petitioner has stated that he is unable to comply with the noted order due to financial constraints. He has further contended that his inability to comply with the order is rendered his defence being struck off, the copy of the noted order according to the learned Counsel is not available. He has further contended that if the copy of noted order apparently passed on 03.12.2025 is made available to him, he shall seek his remedy in accordance with law before the trial Court. He is also at liberty to argue before the trial Court for reduction of maintenance whilst passing the Judgment in Family Suit No. 5609 of 2024 highlighting his financial circumstances. With this observations the instant Petition is disposed of. Needless to mention that the trial Court while passing the final Judgment and Decree shall not be influenced by the interim order dated 24.05.2025. Petition stands disposed of. J U D G E Arshad/
